news.title: Morocco reach quarter-finals as co-hosts Canada knocked out

news.title: 'I decided last minute!' - Salah on Panenka penalty

dataSource.note: CupCalendar applies live match status, scores, and computed standings into data/site.json so the static site rebuild reflects current tournament data.
